What We Sell

Our Farm-Fresh Products

Handpicked, naturally processed, and packed with love — straight from the farm to your table.

Staple · Snack
Crunchy Garri Ijebu

The crunchiest, most authentic Garri Ijebu you'll ever taste — naturally fermented, sun-dried, and packed to perfection. A Nigerian staple loved by all.

100% NaturalFan Favourite
Flour · Protein
Natural Beans Flour

Stone-milled, pure beans flour with no additives. Perfect for Moi Moi, Akara, and more Nigerian delicacies. 100% natural with no preservatives.

No AdditivesHigh Protein
Porridge · Breakfast
Pap / Ogi (Akamu)

Silky smooth fermented corn porridge infused with ginger and pepper — a nourishing Nigerian breakfast that boosts immunity and heals the gut.

Corn · Ginger · PepperAll Natural
Snack · Meat
Spicy Kilishi

Thinly sliced, spice-coated dried beef — the ultimate Northern Nigerian snack. Ingredients: Beef, Ginger, Garlic, Salt, Pepper. Bold, rich, unforgettable.

🌶 SpicyBeef · Ginger · Garlic
Snack · Traditional
Kuli-Kuli

Crispy groundnut cakes made the traditional way — a beloved Nigerian snack that's crunchy, tasty, and full of natural goodness. Simply irresistible!

Classic RecipeCrunchy · Natural
Breakfast Combo
Pap/Koko & Akara

The perfect Nigerian breakfast combo — smooth creamy Koko pap paired with freshly made Akara (bean cakes). A morning tradition like no other.

Comfort FoodBreakfast Special
Assorted · Peppered
Peppered Assorted

Available peppered: Gizzard, Ponmo, Akara, Small Chop, Snail, Moi Moi, Plantain Chips, Chinchin, Crayfish, Fish (Eja Yoyo), Ede & Groundnut.

🌶 PepperedMultiple Options
Staple · Bulk Pack
Garri Ijebu – Bulk Pack

Our Crunchy Garri Ijebu also comes in larger bulk packs — ideal for families, caterers, and resellers. Same great quality, bigger value.

Bulk AvailableBest Value

Why Choose Us

Farm to Table. Always Fresh.

We care deeply about what goes into your food — and what doesn't.

🌿

100% Natural

Every product contains only natural ingredients — no preservatives, no artificial flavours, no shortcuts. Pure goodness, always.

🇳🇬

Proudly Nigerian

We celebrate Nigerian food culture by delivering authentic, traditional recipes to your doorstep — wherever you are in the world.

📦

Hygienic Packaging

All products are carefully sealed in clean, airtight packs to preserve freshness, taste, and nutritional value from farm to table.

✅

Registered & Trusted

Delifted Farms (RC: 2442201) and Delifted Limited (RC: 873061) are fully registered Nigerian businesses built on trust and quality.
